name: Paracetamol
description: Used to treat fever and mild to moderate pain.

name: Amoxicillin
description: Antibiotic used for various bacterial infections.

name: Acetaminophen
description: Pain reliever and fever reducer.

name: Doxycycline
description: Treats acne, respiratory, and other infections.

name: Ibuprofen
description: Used for pain, inflammation, and fever relief.

name: Aspirin
description: Reduces pain, inflammation, and prevents blood clots.

name: Diclofenac
description: Used to treat joint pain and arthritis.

name: Cetirizine
description: Antihistamine used to treat allergies.

name: Loratadine
description: Non-drowsy allergy medication.

name: Pantoprazole
description: Reduces stomach acid and treats GERD.

name: Omeprazole
description: Used to treat acid reflux and ulcers.

name: Domperidone
description: Relieves nausea and improves digestion.

name: ORS (Oral Rehydration Salts)
description: Used to treat dehydration from diarrhea.

name: Azithromycin
description: Broad-spectrum antibiotic for respiratory infections.

name: Ciprofloxacin
description: Treats UTIs and bacterial infections.

name: Nimesulide
description: Anti-inflammatory and fever reducer.

name: Metformin
description: Used to control blood sugar in type 2 diabetes.

name: Amlodipine
description: Treats high blood pressure and chest pain.

name: Losartan
description: Used to treat high blood pressure.

name: Atorvastatin
description: Used to lower cholesterol levels.

name: Chlorpheniramine
description: Used for relief from cold and allergic symptoms.

name: Ranitidine
description: Treats heartburn and ulcers.

name: Famotidine
description: Reduces stomach acid production.
